ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let list = [];
let resultData = JSON.parse(result);

let targetData = resultData.data || resultData.list || resultData.book_list || 
                resultData.publication_list || resultData.result || resultData;
                
if (targetData != null && targetData.book_shelf_info) {
    let bookIds = targetData.book_shelf_info.map(item => `{"book_id": "${item.book_id}"}`).join(',');
    
    let booksData = java.ajax(
`https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{"method": "post","body": {"books":[${bookIds}]}}`
        );
    
    let books = JSON.parse(booksData).data.detail_list;
    for (let i in books) {
        let d = books[i];
        list.push({
            src: d,
            book_name: d.book_name,
            author: d.author,
            category:d.category,
            tags:d.tags,
            word_number:d.word_number,
            lastChapterTitle: d.last_chapter_title,
            abstract: d.abstract,
            book_id: d.book_id,
        });
    }
} else {
    list = targetData.content || targetData;
}

JSON.stringify({data: list})
</js>
data.data||data.list||book_list||data.publication_list||data.result||data

bookSourceComment:
① 发布页：https://jmcomicgo.me
  
②❗❗❗需要在登录页面获取网址❗❗❗

③ 部分内容需要登录才会显示
  
④ 登录页面点击分流按钮切换站内分流，1，2，3，4代表站内分流线路

⑤ 更改发现排列在登录切换,切换后刷新发现

⑥ 复制xiaohan231大佬图片解密，支持了对未加密图片观看

⑦增加了对发布页的更新，增加了对小说支持，增加了两个分流线路支持,小说最新章节90天后解锁

ruleContent.content:
try{ const bbb = book.getVariable("custom"); const sss = source.getVariable(); if (/jjwxc|vipContent/.test(baseUrl)) { function decode(){ baseUrl = `https://app.jjwxc.org/androidapi/chapterContent?versionCode=381&${bDe(baseUrl)}`; //let date = "Mobile " + Date.now(); let response = java.get(baseUrl, {}); let content = String(response.body()); isPay = !/"content"/.test(content)&&!/"data":{}/.test(content); if(isPay){ let accesskey = String(response.header("accesskey")); let keyString = String(response.header("keystring")); let accesskeyLen = accesskey.length; let v6 = accesskey.charCodeAt(accesskeyLen - 1); let v9 = 0; for (var i = 0; i < accesskey.length; i++) { v9 += accesskey.charCodeAt(i); } let v15 = v9 % keyString.length; let v17 = Math.floor(v9 / 65); let v18 = keyString.length; let v43 = keyString.substring(v15, v17 + v15 > v18 ? v18 : v17 + v15);; let v32 = content.length; let [v38, dest] = (v6 & 1) !== 0 ? [content.slice(-12), content.slice(0, -12)] : [content.slice(0, 12), content.slice(12)]; let key = java.md5Encode(v43 + v38).slice(0, 8); let iv = java.md5Encode(v38).slice(0, 8); content = java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", key, iv).decryptStr(dest); } return content } let intro = String(java.get("intro1")).replace(/\s/g, ''); const hasContent = /"content"/.test(result); java.setContent(hasContent ? result : decode()); intro = intro ? `◎${intro}◎
` : ''; let content = String(java.getString("$..content")); let saybody = String((/关闭作话/.test(bbb) || /关闭作话/.test(sss))?"":java.getString("$..sayBody")); saybody = saybody.replace(/(?:.*(?:蟹蟹|扔了|感谢|投出|灌溉营养液|送的|谢谢).*?(?:手榴|月票|霸王票|小天使|火箭炮|深水鱼雷|浅水炸弹|地雷|营养液)([xX]\d+)*.*|非常感谢大家对我的支持，我会继续努力的！|.*?瓶[；~]|“.*?”(?:营养液|手榴弹|月票|霸王票|小天使|火箭炮|深水鱼雷|浅水炸弹|地雷)x\d+|读者.*?(月石|营养液).*|地雷感谢：[\s\S]+)/g,''); let say = /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(saybody) ? `\n【📢作者有话说】\n${saybody}` : ''; if (/token|vipContent/.test(baseUrl)) { const vipc = content.length > 30 ? java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", "KW8Dvm2N", "1ae2c94b").decryptStr(content) : `${/23110/.test(String(java.getString("$..message")))?"请使用安卓端的token":java.getString("$..message")}\n❗️登录后请先更新目录，再刷新正文`; result = intro + vipc + say; } else { result = intro + content + say; } } result; }catch(e){ java.log(e) } ##为营造更好的评论环境，近期网站要求发评须进行实名认证，未实名用户评论暂时仅在对应作者后台及发评用户后台可见.*|获取正文失败[\s\S]+|◎\s+?◎|◎undefined◎

<js>
c = chapter;
if(/^◎/.test(result) ){
	chapter = result.match(/◎([\s\S]+?)(…)*◎/)[1].replace(/\s/g,'').replace(/,/g,'，');
	chapter2=result.match(/◎[\s\S]+?◎([\s\S]+)/)[1].replace(/\s/g,'').replace(/,/g,'，');
	num = 4;	if(chapter.substring(0,num)==chapter2.substring(0,num)){
		result = result.replace(/◎[\s\S]+?◎\s*/,'')
	}else{result}
}else{result}

function removeDuplicatedParagraphs(text, chapterTitle) {
    var paragraphs = text.split('\n');
    var firstParagraph = paragraphs[0].trim();
    var containsSpecialChar = firstParagraph.includes('◎');
    var targetIndex = containsSpecialChar ? 1 : 0;
    var targetParagraph = paragraphs[targetIndex].trim();
    var lastChar = targetParagraph.charAt(targetParagraph.length - 1);
    var isPunctuation = /[——◎。！？，；：\?!,;:》 】）”’…~"'\)]/.test(lastChar);
    
    if (!isPunctuation) {
        for (var i = 0; i < chapterTitle.length - 1; i++) {
            var twoChars = chapterTitle.substring(i, i + 2);
            if (twoChars === '  ' || twoChars.includes('☪')) continue;
            
            if (targetParagraph.includes(twoChars)) {
                java.log("删除当前段落：" + targetParagraph);
                java.log("当前章节名：" + chapterTitle);
                java.log("相同连续文字：" + twoChars);
                paragraphs.splice(targetIndex, 1);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    return paragraphs.join('\n');
}


let bbb = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
let sss = String(source.getVariable());
if(/净化/.test(sss)||/净化/.test(bbb))result = removeDuplicatedParagraphs(result, title);
result = result.replace(/<br\/>/g,'\n');

result
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
if(/incrementFavorite/.test(baseUrl)){
let order = Number(java.get("order"));
function sortBooks(data, order) {
  let sortedData = JSON.parse(data).addData;
  if (java.get("classid") == "0") {
    sortedData = sortedData.filter(book => book.classId === "0");
  }
  switch(order) {
    case 1: 
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {   	
        return Date.parse(b.chapterdateNewest.replace(/ /,'T')) - Date.parse(a.chapterdateNewest.replace(/ /,'T'));
      });
      break;   
    case 2:
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.favoriteDate) - Number(a.favoriteDate);
      });
      break;    
    case 3:
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.novelbefavoritedcount) - Number(a.novelbefavoritedcount);
      });
      break;    
    case 4:   
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.original_novelsize) - Number(a.original_novelsize);
      });
      break;    
    default:
      break;
  }
  return sortedData;
}
result = JSON.stringify(sortBooks(src,order))
	}
	
function transformNovelList(jsonData) {
    const data = typeof jsonData === 'string' ? JSON.parse(jsonData) : jsonData;
    Object.keys(data.novellist).forEach(categoryName => {
        data.novellist[categoryName].forEach(novel => {
            novel.cname = categoryName;
        });
    });
    
    return JSON.stringify(data)
}
if(/authorid=/.test(baseUrl))result=transformNovelList(result);

if(baseUrl.includes("favObservationByDate")){
	let nb = String(Map("nb")||"1,2,3,4,8,9");
	nb = nb.split(",");
	let list= JSON.parse(result).data.list;
	let l = [];
	list.forEach((x,i)=>{
		x.p = "第"+(i+1)+"名";
		let fz = x.fit_fenzhan;
		let r = fz.filter(v=>nb.includes(v));
		  if(r.length==2)l.push(x);
		});
		result = JSON.stringify(l);
	}
result
</js>

let sss = String(source.getVariable())

if(/(加入|移入|移出).*?\d*/.test(sss)){
let url,sign,signbody,r;
if(/加入.*?\d+/.test(sss)){
url = "https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/addFavorite";
signbody = `${Date.now()}:${Map("token")}:${novelId}`;
sign = encodeURIComponent(encode(signbody));
 post = {
 	"method":"POST", 	"body":"versionCode=444&sign="+sign+"&classId="+sss.match(/加入.*?::(\d+)/)[1]
 	};
r = java.ajax(url+","+JSON.stringify(post));
r = JSON.parse(r)?.data?.list?.[0];
java.longToast((r?.message??"请登录")+"至【"+(r?.classname??"请登录")+"】");
};
if(/移出/.test(sss)){
	url = "https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/delFavorite";
	post = {
		"method":"POST",
		"body":`versionCode=444&token=${Map("token")}&novelId=${novelId}`
		}
	r = java.ajax(url+","+JSON.stringify(post));
r = JSON.parse(r)?.data?.list?.[0];
java.longToast(r?.message??"请登录");
	}
if(/移入.*?\d+/.test(sss)){
	url = "https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/changeNovelFavoriteClass";
	post = {
		"method":"POST",
		"body":`versionCode=444&token=${Map("token")}&novelIds=${novelId}&className=${sss.match(/移入(.*?)::/)[1]}&classId=${sss.match(/::(\d+)/)[1]}`
		}
r = java.ajax(url+","+JSON.stringify(post));
r = JSON.parse(r);
java.longToast(r?.message??"请登录");
	}

if(!/批量(?:加入|移出|移入).*\d*\s*/.test(sss)){source.setVariable(sss.replace(/(?:加入|移出|移入).*\d*\s*/,''));
}


}


var 有卷名src =!cache.get("有卷名src"+novelId)?java.ajax("https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/chapterList?novelId="+novelId+"&more=0&whole=1"):cache.get("有卷名src"+novelId);

有卷名src = JSON.parse(有卷名src);

var message = 有卷名src?.message;
if(/\d+_[\w\d]{16,}/.test(token)&&!/1058/.test(message)){
	
let 	tokenUrl =  "https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/chapterList?novelId="+novelId+"&more=0&whole=1&token="+token;
	
let tokenSrc = (!cache.get("tokenSrc"+novelId)||/登入验证失败/.test(cache.get("tokenSrc"+novelId)))?JSON.parse(java.ajax(tokenUrl)):JSON.parse(cache.get("tokenSrc"+novelId));


cache.delete("有卷名src"+novelId);


let lessData = tokenSrc.chapterlist;

let moreData = 有卷名src.chapterlist;
if(lessData!==undefined){
for(let item of lessData) {
    let match = moreData.find(moreItem => moreItem.chapterid === item.chapterid && moreItem.chaptertype === item.chaptertype);
    if(match) {
        Object.assign(match, item);
    }
}
}
JSON.stringify(moreData)
}else{
	result = JSON.stringify(有卷名src)
	}
}catch(e){
	java.log(e)
	}

variableComment:
源变量

填写【移出/加入/移入书架数据】 —— 这是用来操作晋江app的收藏的，如
移出尚未分类::0 会把当前书籍移出晋江的收藏
加入尚未分类::0,1,1 会加入收藏至晋江的尚未分类书架
移入尚未分类::0,0,2 会把已加入晋江收藏的书籍移入晋江的尚未分类书架。
书架数据：在登录页的【📚获取书架】获取，获取后将显示在源变量设置
刷新详情页生效之后会删除【移出/加入/移入书架数据】字样。
填写【批量移出/加入/移入书架数据】则不会自动删除这些字样，在阅读的书架刷新会批量操作，需要手动删除，避免重复请求。

其他源变量操作请在登录里查看【使用说明】

<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    java.setContent(ml)
    var txt = java.getString("#txt>p@text");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

function x(a, b) { result = String(result).replace(a, b); } //debug function d(debug) { java.log(debug); java.log(result); } //同时加载多章时，自动验证成功后有的页面加载失败时重新获取 if(/.*1234/.test(src)){ //重新设置正文解析内容 java.setContent(java.ajax(baseUrl)); } //获取正文内容 result = java.getString('.page-content@tag.p.0@html'); //大概第四页正文有切割，需要调接口获取这一页剩余正文 if (/\$.post\('',{'j':'1'}/.test(src)) { result += java.ajax(String(baseUrl + ',' + JSON.stringify({ "method": "POST", "body": "j=1" }))) } //d("正文"+baseUrl) //有问题修改下面正则 两个br标签换行显示 x(/((\s*)
\n?){2}/g,"

"); //d('1.0:') x(//g,""); try { // Aes解密 secret = src.match(/=\s*secret\(\s*['"](.+?)['"],[\s]*['"](.+?)['"],[^);]*?/); string = secret[1] code = java.md5Encode(secret[2]); iv = code.substring(0, 16); key = code.substring(16); //java.log(baseUrl + " Aes解密ok：" + code + "\n" + iv + "\n" + key) result = java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/CBC/PKCS7Padding", key, iv).decryptStr(string); } catch (err) { try { // 乱序恢复 ns = java.base64Decode(src.match(/var ns='(.+?)';/)[1]).split(','); //java.log(baseUrl + "乱序恢复ok") paragraphArr = result.split('

'); result = ""; for (i = 1; i <= paragraphArr.length; i++) { result += paragraphArr[ns[i] - ns[0]] + '

'; } } catch (err) { //java.log(baseUrl + "乱序恢复Aes解密no") } } //初始化图片链接 x(/(]+>[\t ]*[\r\n]?/g, "#$1#"); //初始化字体格式的文字,匹配 x(/(.*?)<\/i>/g, function(str, p1) { //java.log(p1.charCodeAt().toString(16)); //返回16进制，例：p1= 返回格式#e800# return '#' + p1.charCodeAt().toString(16) + '#' }) //d('2.0:') //转换空格 x(/ /g, ' '); //初始化分段准备 x(/[\t  ]{2,2}/g, "　"); //去掉标签里的属性 x(/(\<|<)([^\>]*?)(\s| )[^\>]*(\>|>)/g, "<$2>"); //d('2.1:') //段落换行 x(/\s*(\n|)+\s*(　{2,})?/gi, "\r\n"); //d('3.0:') //去掉不需要的标签 x(/([\r\n　]*\<\/?([A-Za-z]*)?\>[\r\n　]*)/gi, ""); //引号替换 x(/‘/g, "『"); x(/’/g, "』"); x(/“/g, "「"); x(/”/g, "」"); if (/(Undefined|(^\s*$))/.test(result)) { result = "
　　网站分页有时有问题不可用，速度慢的时候就会是现在这样了，网站速度快的时候就没事了。

" + result; } //d("正文"+baseUrl) "\r\n" + result + "hereispagebreak";

ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{@@[property$=chapter_name]@content##正文卷.|正文.|VIP卷.|默认卷.|卷_|VIP章节.|免费章节.|章节目录.|最新章节.|[\(（【].*?[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字].*?[】）\)]}}･{{@@[property$=update_time]@content##\s.*}}@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let free = source.getVariable() == "1"
let data = JSON.parse(result).data
let bid = baseUrl.match(/bookId=(\d+)/)[1]
let chapterList = []
data['vs'].forEach(list => {
  chapterList.push({
    name: String(list.vN),
    voltype: true
  })
  list['cs'].forEach(chapter => {
    let isVip = chapter.sS!="1" && !free ? "🔒":""
    let href = `https://vipreader.qidian.com/chapter/${bid}/${chapter.id}/`
    let url = list.hS == true || free ? `${href},{'webView': true}` : href
    chapterList.push({
      name: String(isVip+chapter.cN).trim().replace(/^(\d+)(?![\s\d卷部章节回.])/, '$1 ').replace(/\s+/g, " "),
      url: url,
      info: `更新时间: ${chapter.uT} 字数: ${chapter.cnt}`,
      voltype: false
    })
  })
})
chapterList
</js>

<js>
(() => {
    let html = java.ajax("https://bbxxxx.com/"); 
    
    // 阅读 App 在执行发现页 JS 时，可以直接通过变量 page 获取当前页码
    // 如果 page 未定义，默认设为 1
    let p = (typeof page !== 'undefined') ? page : 1;

    const getUrl = (baseUrl) => {
        // 第一页保持原样，后续页码拼接 {{page}}.html
        // 注意：这里直接返回字符串结果，避免在字符串内部嵌套引号
        return p == 1 ? baseUrl : baseUrl + p + ".html";
    };

    let list = [
        { "title": "最新", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/new/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } },
        { "title": "热门", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/hot/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } },
        { "title": "完本", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/complete/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } }
    ];
    
    // 分类
    list.push({ "title": "分类", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } });
    let reg1 = /<a href="(\/category\/\d+\/)">(.*?)<\/a>/g;
    let match1;
    while ((match1 = reg1.exec(html)) !== null) {
        list.push({
            "title": match1[2],
            "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com" + match1[1]) + "/{{page}}.html" +  ",{\"webView\":true}",
            "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 }
        });
    }

    // 标签
    list.push({ "title": "标签", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } });
    let reg = /<a href="(\/tag\/\d+\/)">(.*?)<\/a>/g;
    let match;
    while ((match = reg.exec(html)) !== null) {
        list.push({
            "title": match[2],
            "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com" + match[1]) + "/{{page}}.html" + ",{\"webView\":true}",
            "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 }
        });
    }
    
    return JSON.stringify(list);
})()
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
function login(){
userInfo=source.getLoginInfoMap()
java.log(userInfo)
UNE=userInfo['手机号码/邮箱号']
PWD=userInfo['密码']
url="{{source.getKey()}}/api/passport/login,";
SU=source.getKey()
body={
  "account": String(UNE),
  "password": String(PWD),
  "mp_token": -1
}
option={
'method': 'POST',
'body': JSON.stringify(body)
}

url=url+JSON.stringify(option)
token=java.ajax(url).match(/"auth_token":"([^"]+)"/)[1]

Cookie={
	"Cookie":"auth_token="+token
	}
header = JSON.stringify(Cookie)
source.putLoginHeader(header)
}
</js>

ruleBookInfo.bookInfoInit:
<js>
(function(){
    function needVerify(s){
        s = String(s || '');
        return /Just a moment|Cloudflare|challenge-platform|cf-browser-verification|security check|验证您是真人/i.test(s);
    }
    function trim(s){
        return s ? String(s).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '') : '';
    }
    function text(doc, sel){
        var e = doc.select(sel).first();
        return e ? trim(e.text()) : '';
    }
    function attr(doc, sel, name){
        var e = doc.select(sel).first();
        return e ? trim(e.attr('abs:' + name)) : '';
    }

    var html = String(result || '');
    if (needVerify(html)) {
        try { cookie.removeCookie(source.getKey()); } catch(e) {}
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(baseUrl, 'CF验证').body();
    }

    var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html, baseUrl);
    var introNode = doc.select('#book_info .intro').first();
    var intro = '';
    if (introNode) {
        introNode.select('a').unwrap();
        intro = trim(introNode.text());
    }

    var kind = text(doc, '.title99.title a[href*=book/index.php?type]');
    var tags = [];
    var tagEls = doc.select('#book_info h4:eq(1) a');
    for (var i = 0; i < tagEls.size(); i++) {
        var t = trim(tagEls.get(i).text());
        if (t && t != kind) tags.push(t);
    }
    if (tags.length > 0) {
        kind = kind ? (kind + ',' + tags.join(',')) : tags.join(',');
    }

    var count = doc.select('#dir dd').size();
    return {
        n: text(doc, '#book_info h2'),
        a: text(doc, '#author_box h4') || text(doc, '#book_info h4:eq(0) a'),
        k: kind,
        w: count > 0 ? (count + '章') : '',
        l: text(doc, '#dir dd:last-child a'),
        i: intro,
        c: attr(doc, '#book_info img', 'src'),
        t: String(baseUrl)
    };
})()
</js>

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
(function(){
    function needVerify(s){
        s = String(s || '');
        return /Just a moment|Cloudflare|challenge-platform|cf-browser-verification|security check|验证您是真人/i.test(s);
    }
    function trim(s){
        return s ? String(s).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '') : '';
    }
    function parse(html){
        var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(String(html || ''), baseUrl);
        var items = doc.select('ul.list_box > li');
        var arr = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < items.size(); i++) {
            var it = items.get(i);
            var author = '';
            var kind = '';
            var h4s = it.select('h4');
            for (var j = 0; j < h4s.size(); j++) {
                var t = trim(h4s.get(j).text());
                if (!author && /作者[:：]/.test(t)) author = t.replace(/^.*?作者[:：]\s*/, '');
                if (!kind && /分类[:：]/.test(t)) kind = t.replace(/^.*?分类[:：]\s*/, '');
            }
            arr.push({
                n: trim(it.select('h2>a').text()),
                a: author || trim(it.select('h4:contains(作者) a').text()),
                k: kind || trim(it.select('h4:contains(分类) a').text()),
                i: trim(it.select('.intro').text()),
                c: trim(it.select('img').attr('abs:src')),
                u: trim(it.select('h2>a').attr('abs:href'))
            });
        }
        return arr;
    }

    var html = String(result || '');
    var list = parse(html);

    if (list.length == 0 && needVerify(html)) {
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(baseUrl, 'CF验证').body();
        list = parse(html);
    }

    return list;
})()
</js>

doc.select('#pid' + pid).first() : doc.select('.plc.cl').first(); var msg = post ? post.select('.message').first() : null; if (!msg) return ''; msg = msg.clone(); msg.select('i.pstatus, script, style, rt, .quote, .pstatus, .aimg_tip, .jammer').remove(); var rubies = msg.select('ruby'); for (var r = rubies.size() - 1; r >= 0; r--) rubies.get(r).unwrap(); var imgMap = {}; var imgs = msg.select('img'); for (var i = imgs.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var img = imgs.get(i); var src = trim(img.attr('abs:src')) || trim(img.attr('abs:zsrc')) || trim(img.attr('src')) || trim(img.attr('zsrc')); if (!src) { img.remove(); continue; } var token = '§§IMG' + i + '§§'; img.after('\n' + token + '\n'); img.remove(); imgMap[token] = ''; } var as = msg.select('a'); for (var j = as.size() - 1; j >= 0; j--) as.get(j).unwrap(); var h = String(msg.html() || ''); h = h.replace(/]*>/ig, '\n'); h = h.replace(/]*>/ig, '\n\n'); h = h.replace(/]*>/ig, '\n'); h = h.replace(/<\/(?:li|div|p|section|blockquote|article|header|footer|aside|tr|td|th|ul|ol|table|tbody|thead|tfoot)>/ig, '\n'); h = h.replace(/]*>/ig, '\n\n'); h = h.replace(/<\/h[1-6]>/ig, '\n\n'); h = h.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ''); h = decodeTextLines(h); for (var key in imgMap) { h = h.split(key).join('\n\n' + imgMap[key] + '\n\n'); } h = h.replace(/\u00A0/g, ' '); h = h.replace(/[ \t\f\v]+/g, ' '); h = h.replace(/ *\n */g, '\n'); h = h.replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n'); h = trim(h); if (!h) return ''; var blocks = h.split(/\n\n+/); var out = []; for (var p = 0; p < blocks.length; p++) { var part = trim(blocks[p]); if (!part) continue; if (part.indexOf('= 0) out.push(part); else out.push(part.replace(/\n+/g, '\n')); } return out.join('\n\n'); })();

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
(function(){
    var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result, baseUrl);
    function trim(s){ return s ? String(s).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "") : ""; }
    function text(el){ return el ? trim(el.text()) : ""; }
    function absHref(el){ return el ? trim(el.attr("abs:href")) : ""; }
    function norm(s){ return trim(String(s || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ")); }
    function forumIdFromUrl(u){ var m = String(u || "").match(/[?&]fid=(\d+)/); return m ? m[1] : ""; }
    function forumNameFromId(fid){ if (fid == "30") return "中文百合漫画区"; if (fid == "49") return "文学区"; if (fid == "55") return "轻小说/译文区"; return ""; }
    function cleanForumName(s){ return norm(s).replace(/^#/, "").replace(/文學區/g, "文学区"); }
    function makeBookUrl(threadUrl, uid){ var m = String(threadUrl || "").match(/[?&]tid=(\d+)/); if (m && uid) return "https://bbs.yamibo.com/forum.php?mod=viewthread&tid=" + m[1] + "&page=1&authorid=" + uid + "&mobile=2"; return trim(threadUrl || ""); }
    function shouldKeep(title, desc, forumId, label, icon){
        if (!title) return false;
        if (icon && icon.indexOf("投票") >= 0) return false;
        if (!/^(30|49|55)$/.test(String(forumId || ""))) return false;
        if (/版规|版規|目录编辑教程|目錄編輯教程|新人须知|新人須知|如何找回账号|如何修改密码|禁止转载|禁止轉載|求助|報到|签到|簽到|公告/.test(title)) return false;
        var hay = [title, desc, label].join(" ");
        var kw = /(翻译|翻譯|渣翻|自翻|渣译|渣譯|转载|轉載|生肉|更新|话|話|章|长篇|長篇|短篇|中篇|译介|譯介|文库|文庫|完结|完結|汉化组|漢化組|汉化|漢化|第.{0,10}[话話章]|[0-9一二三四五六七八九十百零〇]+[话話章])/i;
        return kw.test(hay);
    }
    var list = [];
    var items = doc.select('.threadlist li.list');
    for (var i = 0; i < items.size(); i++) {
        var li = items.get(i);
        var title = norm(text(li.select('.threadlist_tit').first()));
        var poster = text(li.select('.muser a.mmc').first());
        var uidHref = absHref(li.select('.muser a.mmc').first());
        var uidM = uidHref.match(/[?&]uid=(\d+)/);
        var uid = uidM ? uidM[1] : '';
        var desc = norm(text(li.select('.threadlist_mes').first()));
        var labelEl = li.select('.threadlist_foot li.mr a').first();
        var label = cleanForumName(text(labelEl));
        var forumHref = absHref(labelEl);
        var forumId = forumIdFromUrl(forumHref) || forumIdFromUrl(baseUrl);
        var forumName = forumNameFromId(forumId) || label;
        var icon = norm(text(li.select('.threadlist_tit .micon, .threadlist_tit em').first())).replace(/[\[\]]/g, '');
        if (!shouldKeep(title, desc, forumId, label, icon)) continue;
        var threadUrl = absHref(li.select("a[href*='viewthread']").first());
        var bookUrl = makeBookUrl(threadUrl, uid);
        var kind = '百合会' + (forumName ? ',' + forumName : '') + (icon ? ',' + icon : '');
        var intro = (forumName ? ('[' + forumName + '] ') : '') + desc;
        list.push({name:title, author: trim(poster || ''), kind:kind, word:'', last:text(li.select('.mtime').first()), intro:intro, cover:'', url:bookUrl});
    }
    return list;
})();
</js>
ruleExplore.name: name
ruleExplore.author: author

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
(function(){
    var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result, baseUrl);
    function trim(s){ return s ? String(s).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '') : ''; }
    function norm(s){ return trim(String(s || '').replace(/\u00A0/g, ' ').replace(/[ \t\r\f\v]+/g, ' ')); }
    function decodeTextLines(s){
        s = String(s || '').replace(/\r/g, '');
        var arr = s.split('\n');
        for (var i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) arr[i] = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(arr[i]).text();
        return arr.join('\n');
    }
    function messageToText(msgEl){
        if (!msgEl) return '';
        var c = msgEl.clone();
        c.select('i.pstatus, script, style, rt, .quote, .pstatus, .aimg_tip, .jammer').remove();
        var rubies = c.select('ruby');
        for (var i = rubies.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) rubies.get(i).unwrap();
        var as = c.select('a');
        for (var j = as.size() - 1; j >= 0; j--) as.get(j).unwrap();
        var h = String(c.html() || '');
        h = h.replace(/<br[^>]*>/ig, '\n');
        h = h.replace(/<hr[^>]*>/ig, '\n\n');
        h = h.replace(/<li[^>]*>/ig, '\n');
        h = h.replace(/<\/(?:li|div|p|section|blockquote|article|header|footer|aside|tr|td|th|ul|ol|table|tbody|thead|tfoot)>/ig, '\n');
        h = h.replace(/<h[1-6][^>]*>/ig, '\n\n');
        h = h.replace(/<\/h[1-6]>/ig, '\n\n');
        h = h.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '');
        h = decodeTextLines(h);
        h = h.replace(/\u00A0/g, ' ');
        h = h.replace(/[ \t\f\v]+/g, ' ');
        h = h.replace(/ *\n */g, '\n');
        h = h.replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n');
        return trim(h);
    }
    function linesFromMessage(msgEl){
        var txt = messageToText(msgEl);
        var raw = txt.split(/\n+/);
        var arr = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < raw.length; i++) {
            var line = norm(raw[i]);
            if (!line) continue;
            if (/^(本帖最后由|評分|评分|點評|点评|參與人數|参与人数|積分|积分|理由|查看全部评分)/.test(line)) continue;
            arr.push(line);
        }
        return arr;
    }
    function cleanThreadTitle(){
        var t = trim(doc.select('.view_tit').first().text());
        t = t.replace(/^\s*(?:[\[【][^\]】]{1,20}[\]】]\s*)+/g, '');
        t = t.replace(/[\[【](?:\d+[.\-/]\d+更新.*?|更新.*?|完结.*?|完結.*?)[\]】]\s*$/g, '');
        t = t.replace(/\s+\d+\s*\/\s*\d+\s*(?:\(\d+\s*\/\s*\d+\))?\s*$/g, '');
        return trim(t);
    }
    function firstMeaningful(lines, rawTitle, imgCount){
        if (imgCount >= 2) return rawTitle;
        for (var i = 0; i < lines.length && i < 16; i++) {
            var line = lines[i];
            if (/^(作品名稱|作品名称|作品名|書名|书名|標題|标题|題名|题名|原名|作者\s*[:：]?|原作\s*[:：]?|原著\s*[:：]?|翻譯\s*[:：]?|翻译\s*[:：]?|譯者\s*[:：]?|译者\s*[:：]?|校對\s*[:：]?|校对\s*[:：]?|圖源\s*[:：]?|图源\s*[:：]?|嵌字\s*[:：]?|漢化\s*[:：]?|汉化\s*[:：]?|簡介\s*[:：]?|简介\s*[:：]?|內容簡介\s*[:：]?|内容简介\s*[:：]?|原文简介\s*[:：]?|作品連結\s*[:：]?|作品链接\s*[:：]?|連結\s*[:：]?|链接\s*[:：]?|原地址\s*[:：]?|生肉\s*[:：]?|作品標籤\s*[:：]?|作品标签\s*[:：]?|主題\s*[:：]?|主题\s*[:：]?|目錄|目录|邊看邊翻|边看边翻|嚴禁劇透|严禁剧透)/.test(line)) continue;
            if (/^[0-9]{1,3}(后)?$/.test(line)) continue;
            if (line.length <= 1) continue;
            return line;
        }
        return rawTitle;
    }
    function isIntroCatalogPost(index, lines, msg){
        if (index != 0) return false;
        var tocLinks = msg.select("a[href*='goto=findpost'], a[href*='pid=']").size();
        if (tocLinks >= 2) return true;
        var joined = lines.join('\n');
        if (/(作品名稱|作品名称|作品名|書名|书名|作者|原作|原著|簡介|简介)/.test(joined) && /(目錄|目录|索引)/.test(joined)) return true;
        return false;
    }
    function isChapter(name, text, imgCount){
        if (imgCount >= 2) return true;
        if (/^(前言|序章|后记|後記|番外|楔子|序|终章|終章|尾声|尾聲|最終話|最终话|第.{0,16}[话話章节章卷篇回]|[一二三四五六七八九十百零〇0-9]+[话話章节章卷篇回])/.test(name)) return true;
        if (text.length >= 180) return true;
        return false;
    }

    var list = [];
    var posts = doc.select('.plc.cl');
    var pageUrl = String(baseUrl || '').replace(/([?&])__pid=\d+/g, '$1').replace(/&&+/g, '&').replace(/#pid\d+$/g, '');
    var rawTitle = cleanThreadTitle();
    for (var i = 0; i < posts.size(); i++) {
        var post = posts.get(i);
        var pid = String(post.id() || '').replace(/^pid/, '');
        var msg = post.select('.message').first();
        if (!pid || !msg) continue;
        var lines = linesFromMessage(msg);
        if (isIntroCatalogPost(i, lines, msg)) continue;
        var text = lines.join('\n');
        var imgCount = msg.select('img').size();
        var name = firstMeaningful(lines, rawTitle, imgCount);
        if (!isChapter(name, text, imgCount)) continue;
        var url = pageUrl + (pageUrl.indexOf('?') >= 0 ? '&' : '?') + '__pid=' + pid + '#pid' + pid;
        list.push({name: name || rawTitle, url: url});
    }
    return list;
})();
</js>

❤️‍🔥登录必看❤️‍🔥

否则读取不到输入的账号密码
2.跳转卡顿在设置→其他设置中清除WebView缓存

🔔适配兼容
IOS仅适配:源阅,用心读书

🔥注：阅读请使用最新测试版
1.所有源站每20秒最多12章，把预下载调到0-3之间使用
💯[打赏VIP无请求限制,专属书源]
2.自定义源站示例：番茄小说,七猫小说  多个源站用英文,号分隔
源站名参考 登录URL //书源配置列表 v参数

4.搜索模式：
书名@来源 多个来源用英文,号分隔
示例： 
系统@番茄小说，多个源站使用英文,号分隔
书名@类型 返回对应类型所有源站数据，可直接使用@方式搜索或者点击登陆切换模式

exploreUrl:
<js>
let config = (() => {
    try {
        let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
        if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
            cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            java.toast("配置初始化完成");
        }
        return cfg;
    } catch(e) {
        let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
        source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
        return cfg;
    }
})();
    
let rawVariable = source.getVariable();
let 个人中心 = 1;
let obj = (title, url, type) => ({
  title: title,
  url: url,
  style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: type }
});

let sort = [];
let push = (title, url, type) => sort.push(obj(title, url, type));

let currentType = "";
let currentSource = "";
try {
  let vArray = JSON.parse(rawVariable);
  if (vArray.length > 0) {
    let v = vArray[0];
    currentType = v.gender || "";
    currentSource = v.source || "";
  }
} catch(e) {
  currentType = "";
  currentSource = "";
}

const getGenderDisplayName = (gender) => {
  if (gender == "boy") return "男频";
  if (gender == "girl") return "女频";
  return "";
};

const genderDisplay = getGenderDisplayName(currentType);

push(`当前为【${currentSource || "番茄小说"}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}`, "", 1);

if (currentSource == "晋江") {
	   sort.push({
        title: "📝点击签到",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jj_signin`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
    
    sort.push({
        title: "📂我的收藏",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jjbookshelf?token=`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
}

const excludedSources = ["小说", "听书", "漫画", "视频", "短剧", "音频","番茄小说"];

if (currentSource && !excludedSources.includes(currentSource)) {
  try {
    let apiUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}`;
    if (currentType) {
      apiUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
    }
    
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(apiUrl));
    
    if (response.data && response.data.found) {
      response.data.found.forEach(item => {
        let finalUrl = "";
        if (item.url) {
          finalUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}&page={{page}}&url=${item.url}`;
          if (currentType) {
            finalUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
          }
        }
        sort.push({
          title: item.title,
          url: finalUrl,
          style: item.style || { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
        });
      });
    } else {
      push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
  }
  JSON.stringify(sort);
} else {
  let recommendUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_recommend?session=" + getSessionId();
    let guessUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_guess?session=" + getSessionId();
    push('个性推荐', recommendUrl, 0.45);
    push('猜你喜欢', 'https://fanqienovel.com/tab/cai', 0.45);
    push('巅峰榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/author/misc/top_book_list/v1/?limit=100&offset={{(page-1)*100}}', 0.29);
  push('出版榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/node/publication/list?page_index={{(page-1)*100}}&page_count=100', 0.29);
  push('爆更榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=15&type=1', 0.29);
  push('黑马榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=13&type=1', 0.29);
  push('热搜榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=12&type=1', 0.29);

  let showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];
  
  showCategories.forEach(genderCode => {
    let isMale = genderCode == 1;
    let genderLabel = isMale ? "男频" : "女频";
    
    let categories = isMale ? [
      {id: 1141, name: "西方奇幻"},
      {id: 1140, name: "东方仙侠"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 261, name: "都市日常"},
      {id: 124, name: "都市修真"},
      {id: 1014, name: "都市高武"},
      {id: 273, name: "历史古代"},
      {id: 27, name: "战神赘婿"},
      {id: 263, name: "都市种田"},
      {id: 258, name: "传统玄幻"},
      {id: 272, name: "历史脑洞"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 262, name: "都市脑洞"},
      {id: 257, name: "玄幻脑洞"},
      {id: 751, name: "悬疑灵异"},
      {id: 504, name: "抗战谍战"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 718, name: "动漫衍生"},
      {id: 1016, name: "男频衍生"}
    ] : [
      {id: 1139, name: "古风世情"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 1015, name: "女频衍生"},
      {id: 248, name: "玄幻言情"},
      {id: 23, name: "种田"},
      {id: 79, name: "年代"},
      {id: 267, name: "现言脑洞"},
      {id: 246, name: "宫斗宅斗"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 253, name: "古言脑洞"},
      {id: 24, name: "快穿"},
      {id: 749, name: "青春甜宠"},
      {id: 745, name: "星光璀璨"},
      {id: 747, name: "女频悬疑"},
      {id: 750, name: "职场婚恋"},
      {id: 748, name: "豪门总裁"},
      {id: 1017, name: "民国言情"}
    ];
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}阅读榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=2`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}新书榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=1`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
  });

  let fqCategoryArr = [];
showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];

showCategories.forEach(i => {
  try {
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`${getServerHost()}/type_style?new_category_tab=${i}`));
    let categoryGroups = response.data;
    
    categoryGroups.forEach(group => {
      fqCategoryArr.push(obj(`❤️${group.name}❤️`, null, 1));
      
      group.data.forEach(category => {
        let gender, genre_type;
        if (i == 0) {
          gender = 0;
          genre_type = 0;
        } else if (i == 1) {
          gender = 1;
          genre_type = 0;
        } else {
          gender = 1;
          genre_type = 0;
        }
        
        fqCategoryArr.push({
          title: category.name,
          url: `${getServerHost()}/type_style?category_id=${category.category_id}&genre_type=${genre_type}&gender=${gender}&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&selected_items=`,
          style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
          }
        });
      });
    });
  } catch (e) {
    fqCategoryArr.push(obj("分类加载失败，请重试", null, 1));
  }
});

  fqCategoryArr.forEach(item => {
    if (item.style && item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent) {
      push(item.title, item.url, item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent);
    } else {
      sort.push({
        title: item.title,
        url: item.url,
        style: {
          layout_flexGrow: 1,
          layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
        }
      });
    }
  });

  let hasValidSession = false;
  let username = "";

  try {
    let uinfo = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_user?session=" + getSessionId());
    uinfo = JSON.parse(uinfo);
    
    if (uinfo.data.name) {
      username = uinfo.data.name;
      hasValidSession = true;
    }
  } catch (e) {
  }

  if (!hasValidSession) {
    java.toast("番茄登录已过期，请重新登录");
  }

  let gro = [];
  let pushGro = (title, url, type) => gro.push(obj(title, url, type));

  let sArr = [];

  if (hasValidSession) {
    try {
      let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + getSessionId()));

      if (book_shelf_info.code == 0) {
        个人中心 = 1;
        
        let groups_bookids = { "未分组": [] };
        book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
          if (!groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) 
            groups_bookids[i.group_name] = [];
          groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id);
        });

        Object.keys(groups_bookids).forEach(k => {
          pushGro(k, "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf/groupName/" + k, 0.4);
        });
        if (Object.keys(groups_bookids).length % 2 != 0) pushGro("占位", "", 0.4);
        
        sArr.push(obj(username + '的个人中心', '', 1));
        sArr.push(obj("我的书架", "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf", 1));
        sArr = sArr.concat(gro);
        sArr.push(obj("阅读历史", getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + getSessionId() + "&page={{page}}", 1));
      } else {
        个人中心 = 0;
        java.toast("获取书架信息失败，登录可能已过期");
      }
    } catch (e) {
      个人中心 = 0;
      java.toast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏个人中心");
    }
  } else {
    个人中心 = 0;
    java.toast("您还未登录番茄账号，无法同步数据");
  }

  sort = sArr.concat(sort);
  JSON.stringify(sort);
}
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
    const {java} = this;
    let $ = JSON.parse(url).data;
    let arr = [];
    if ($.book_shelf_info && $.book_shelf_info.length > 0) {
        arr = $.book_shelf_info.map(item => item.book_id);
    } else if ($.data_list && $.data_list.length > 0) {
        arr = $.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str);
    } else {
        java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！");
    }
    return arr;
}

let session = getSessionId()

getShelf = () => {
    let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + session)
    
    bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
    
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200)
    let urls = []
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
    let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() +"/book_shelf?session=" + session))
    
    let group_bookids = {
        "未分组": []
    }
    book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
        if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
        group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
    })
    
    if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
    
    let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 200)
    let urls = []

    book_ids.forEach(i => { 	urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
    let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
        "bookmall/tab",
        "version_name=5.8.9.32",
        null,
        "sessionid=" + session
    )
    let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
    let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
    if (!tab) tab = []
    let bookList = []
    for (let i of tab) {
        bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    }
    return { book_info: bookList }
}

function getGuessYouLike() {
    let apiUrl = 'https://reading.snssdk.com/reading/bookapi/bookmall/tab/v/?version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048&aid=1967&channel=0&os_version=0&app_name=novelapp&version_code=58932&device_platform=android'
    let response = java.ajax(apiUrl + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
        headers: {
            'Cookie': "sessionid=" + session
        }
    }))
    let responseData = JSON.parse(response)
    let finalResult = {
        code: 0,
        message: 'SUCCESS',
        data: {
            cell_view: {
                book_data: []
            }
        }
    }
    if (responseData && responseData.data && responseData.data.tab_item && responseData.data.tab_item.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data) {
        finalResult.data.cell_view.book_data = responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data
    }
    return finalResult
}

function normalizeResponse(data) {
    if (data.data && data.data.book_list && Array.isArray(data.data.book_list)) {
        return data.data.book_list;
    }
    
    if (data.book_info) return data.book_info;
    if (data.data && data.data.book_info) return data.data.book_info;
    if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    if (data.list) return data.list;
    if (data.book_list) return data.book_list;
    if (data.data && data.data.publication_list) return data.data.publication_list;
    if (data.result) return data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.result) return data.data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.cell_view && data.data.cell_view.book_data) {
        return data.data.cell_view.book_data;
    }
    if (data.data && data.data.records) return data.data.records;
    if (data.data && data.data.list) return data.data.list;
    
    return [];
}

if (baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let sortKey = getSortKey() || '';
    let newUrl = baseUrl + sortKey;
    result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(newUrl));
    
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData});
} else if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) {
    result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
} else if(/read_history/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let pageMatch = baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/);
    let page = pageMatch ? pageMatch[1] : '1';
    
    let history_response = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + session + "&page=" + page)
    let history_data = JSON.parse(history_response)
    
    if (history_data.data.data_list) {
        let book_ids = history_data.data.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str)
        
        let id_list = splitArray(book_ids, 200)
        let urls = []
        id_list.forEach(i => {
          urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
        })
        
        let resp = {book_info: []}
        urls.forEach(url => {
            let detailResponse = java.ajax(url)
            let detailData = JSON.parse(detailResponse)
            if (detailData.data) {
                resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(detailData.data)
            }
        })
        
        result = resp
    } else {
        result = {book_info: []}
    }
} else if (baseUrl.includes("style_top")) {
    result = JSON.parse(result);
} else if (baseUrl.includes("/tab/cai")) {
    result = getGuessYouLike();
} else {
    let w = baseUrl.split("/")
    if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
        result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
    } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
        result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
    } else {
        result = JSON.parse(result)
        if (result.data && result.data.data) {
            result = {book_info: result.data.data}
        }
    }
}

if (!baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData})
}
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let catalog = {source: res.source, url: res.url, name: res.name, tab: res.tab || "novel"};

showTabTips(catalog);

let op = {method: "POST", body: catalog};

let catalogUrl = getServerHost() + `/catalog,${JSON.stringify(op)}`;
let response = java.ajax(catalogUrl);
// java.log(response);

let device = deviceType() ? 'android' : 'ios';

if (device == 'android') {
    var typeMap = {audio:32, comic:64};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 8;
} else {
    var typeMap = {audio:1, comic:2, video:3};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 0;
}

JSON.parse(response).data.map((x) => {
    if (x.isVolume == true) {
        x.url = "";
        return x;
    }
    
    x.url = buildChapterUrl(x, catalog, device);
    return x;
});
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
if (!getSecretKey()) {
    java.toast("请登录后使用");
    result = "[]";
} else {
    let config = (() => {
        try {
            let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
            if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
                cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
                source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
                java.toast("配置初始化完成");
            }
            return cfg;
        } catch(e) {
            let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            return cfg;
        }
    })();

    var sourceVal = '';
    var customSource = '';

    try {
        customSource = (source.getLoginInfoMap())['自定义源站'];
    } catch(e) {
        customSource = '';
    }

    if (customSource !== undefined && customSource !== null && String(customSource).trim() !== "") {
        sourceVal = String(customSource).trim();
    } else if (config.source) {
        sourceVal = config.source;
    }

    var param = sourceVal ? '&source=' + encodeURIComponent(sourceVal) : '';

    result = buildSearchResult(key, param, getServerHost());
}
</js>

<js>
let list = [];
let resultData = JSON.parse(result);

let targetData = resultData.data || resultData.list || resultData.book_list || 
                resultData.publication_list || resultData.result || resultData;
                
if (targetData != null && targetData.book_shelf_info) {
    let bookIds = targetData.book_shelf_info.map(item => `{"book_id": "${item.book_id}"}`).join(',');
    
    let booksData = java.ajax(
`https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{"method": "post","body": {"books":[${bookIds}]}}`
        );
    
    let books = JSON.parse(booksData).data.detail_list;
    for (let i in books) {
        let d = books[i];
        list.push({
            src: d,
            book_name: d.book_name,
            author: d.author,
            category:d.category,
            tags:d.tags,
            word_number:d.word_number,
            lastChapterTitle: d.last_chapter_title,
            abstract: d.abstract,
            book_id: d.book_id,
        });
    }
} else {
    list = targetData.content || targetData;
}

JSON.stringify({data: list})
</js>

bookSourceComment:
使用洛雅橙改版阅读Σ最新测试版效果更佳https://github.com/Luoyacheng/legado

原版阅读可配套LOFTER订阅源使用
http://www.yckceo.com/yuedu/rss/json/id/641.json

❗️需登录
◎搜索格式◎
1、搜索用户<关闭精确搜索>
@用户名
2、搜索合集<关闭精确搜索>
#合集
3、搜索粮单
%粮单名<关闭精确搜索>
4、搜索文章，直接搜索

◎一些使用指南◎
仅阅读Σ支持
1、点击作者名查看合集列表，长按作者名查看作者动态。
2、点击详情页◎跳转lofter软件
3、点击正文◎查看评论
4、源变量填写1，开启查看划线评论
5、点击正文章节链接跳转lofter软件【原版阅读也支持】


◎发现规则格式◎
                                    🏷标签
标签名::https://api.lofter.com/oldapi/tagPosts.api?product=lofter-android-7.4.4&method=newTagSearch&offset={{(page-1) *22}}&limit=22&firstpermalink=null&tag=标签名&type=new,{"method": "POST","body":"null"}
📃用户（搜索可以得到)
部分目录章节比较多，加载时间久，出现目录加载失败，请尝试刷新，因为可能是请求失败导致的

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "大灰狼个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

if (String(baseUrl).startsWith("data:")) {
    let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
    let book_id = res.book_id;
    let tab = res.tab;
    let sources = res.sources;
    let url = res.url;
    let html = "";
    let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
    if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
        if (sources == '69书吧') {
            let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
            let headers = {
                "Cookie": ck69
            };
            let op = JSON.stringify({
                "headers": headers
            });
            html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
        } else {
            html = java.ajax(url);
        }
        //java.log(html);
        if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
            cookie.removeCookie(url);
            var x = `https://www.69shuba.com`;
            java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
            var s = java.startBrowserAwait(x, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

            let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
            let headers = {
                "Cookie": ck69
            };
            let op = JSON.stringify({
                "headers": headers
            });
            java.log(op);
            html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
            //java.log(html);
        }
    }
    let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
    let op = {
        method: "POST",
        body: {
            html: html
        }

    });

    java.log(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
    result = java.ajax(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
}
result
</js>$.data
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
var key = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key = "";
}

if (key == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key = "";
        }
        if (key) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "on") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

<js>

if (res.method) {
    res = Object.fromEntries(
        res.body
        .replace("source", "sources")
        .split("&")
        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );
    res.url = "";
}
let book_id = res.book_id;
java.put('book_id', book_id);

let sources = res.sources;

let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "Cookie": ck69
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie(url);
        var x = `https://www.69shuba.com`;
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        var s = java.startBrowserAwait(x, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "Cookie": ck69
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        //java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
        //java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

作者留言：

1.0更新：本网站所有的小说都是免费的，目前已经有了PC端和wap端，APP端目前还有点问题需要调试

本次初次制作好了对接阅读的书源，但是为了避免被大规模盗刷流量，书源暂时没有对接插图

2.0更新：本次更新解决了插图问题，让书源可以显示插图，显示不出来多刷新就行

站长在Cdn处新增速率限制，超过限制会被拉黑，国外地区也会无法访问插图，非官网访问也会无法访问插图

如果后续阅读方面流量过于异常，我会关闭阅读的阅读插图渠道，希望各位可以理解

2.1更新：新增发现页面的选项功能，用户可以更快速便捷的从分类和题材中寻找自己想要的小说

2.2更新：修复发现页面的分类功能异常的问题，现在移除文库分类

2.3更新：修复发现界面过于拥挤，点击作者无法快速搜索作者，总有几本推荐阅读始终占据分类书籍顶部的问题，这里感谢QQ用户雪隐梅香提供的修复


2.4更新：优化了插图排版的问题，如果插图不是一张图片一页，可以尝试在阅读界面右上角手动把图片样式改为SINGLE

2.5更新：本次网站将图床更换为了下行宽带300M，上行200M的大宽带服务器，方便大家更快的使用。与此同时修复了更换图床后，插图异常不显示的问题

2.6更新：网友修改优化版本，由于海外线路需要人机交互，修复了海外线路被阻拦，无法使用书源的问题

2.7更新：修复阅读app下载过快，会触发拉黑的问题，限制并发

2.8更新：兼容苹果用户的读不舍手书源，修复目录异常的问题

注意：

此书源支持苹果用户的TF测试版的读不舍手

以前书源版本可能会出现目录没有文章，或者显示异常

我没有苹果手机，也无法测试和写书源，能够适配一个苹果书源我已经尽力了，大家见谅


2.9更新：上调并发率，并发率太低可能会出现图片加载异常，太高会导致被拉黑

3.0更新：在发现功能中，新增一个【最新】按钮功能，自动索引获取时间戳最新入库50本小说

4.0大更新：本次服务器大优化，配置翻倍到8C8G

全面重写书源，将书源对接改为端口对接，可以设置密码杜绝恶意传播/傻福使用

新增分享页超50+选项

对接信息页信息功能，修复信息页简介丢失异常。

5.0大更新：
新增接口密码，接口错误无法访问与获取网站内容

新增对接书籍屏蔽，同步网站下架与屏蔽手机下架书籍

初步对接阅读文章页章节内容，但插图还有一些问题

新增对接标签获取，信息页可以更好的展示更多信息。

6.0大更新：
修复拦截与加密导致的书源插图失效

修复下架的搜索拦截问题

修复目录获取拦截，文内下架提示异常问题

新增Cloudflare拦截内置浏览器验证功能

重写后端接口，修复部分信息提供，避免编码转换导致插图异常

7.0大更新：
优化后端图片类型的格式，加快图片加载速度（暂不适配苹果书源，会出现没图片的情况）

优化插图部分的限速问题

优化文章内容页的限速问题

修复目录页上限100章的后端异常问题

重写端口优化多层嵌套问题，大幅度提高搜索与加载能力，提升速度2~5倍


更多详情内容，可以关注：www.huanmengacg.com

APP下载链接：https://h5.cloud.189.cn/share.html#/t/MRNR7nEBVZZj%EF%BC%88%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9A0jn0%EF%BC%89

❗️特别标注：本源只支持洛雅橙改版阅读Σ最新测试版https://github.com/Luoyacheng/legado

搜索分类
@用户
%视频
#专栏
&直播
*番剧
？影视

API来源
https://github.com/SocialSisterYi/bilibili-API-collect

url scheme链接来源
AI和网页

⚙️部分功能说明【自己随便点点点看看吧】
登录使用效果更佳

1、详情页界面 
点击书名显示【最新评论】
长按书名显示【热门评论】

点击UP主名字显示 【视频列表/专栏文集】【根据登录页设置来】
长按UP主名字显示 【视频合集/专栏动态】【根据登录页设置来】

点击 查看全部动态【查看动态】
长按 查看全部动态【搜索该up主动态】

点击右上角◎ 打开哔哩哔哩客户端
点击分享按钮，复制分享详情
点击拷贝书籍详情URL  复制网页链接
点击登录 可选择【关注up到b站 [需登录账号]】

2、视频页
点击右上角◎ 打开推荐视频 【影视无效，直播无效】
点击登录 可点赞投币收藏

3、发现页
长按书源选项后打开登录页面，可筛选分类

4、正文页
视频/文章图可点击跳转
🔗📖🎥👤图标可点击跳转

<js>
try{
let all = [];
let 展开符 = "↓ ";
let 收起符 = "↑ ";
let 占位符 = "※"
let 启用占位 = true   //是：true,否：false
//一行个数
let numy = 3;

let d = {
    1: 1,
    2: 0.4,
    3: 0.25,
    4: 0.2,
    5: 0.15,
    7: 0.1,
    10: 0.05
};

let num = d[numy];
let push = (title, url, num, g,action) =>{
	let j = {
    title: title,
    url: url,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: g == 0 ? g : 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: num
    }
  }
     if(action){
         j.action = action.action;
         j.name = action.name;
         j.type = action.type;
         j.chars = action.chars;
         j.viewName = action.viewName;
         j.default = action.default;      
     }     
     all.push(j)	
} 

function zwf(len,numy,num){
	if(len%numy!==0){
        let n = len % numy;
        let p = numy-n;
      
        for(let i=0;i<p;i++){
            push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
        }
    }
}
let navdata = java.ajax("https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/nav")
let mid = JSON.parse(navdata)?.data?.mid || "";
let searchOrder = changeSearch();

push("搜索类型", "", searchOrder.length?0.4:1,1,{
        "type": "select",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索类型'],'searchselect');changeSearch()",
        "chars":["🏷综合","👤用户","🎥视频","📖专栏","🎞影视","📽番剧","📺直播"],
        "default": Map("searchselect")||"综合"
    });
    
    
    if(searchOrder.length){
    push("搜索排序", "", 0.4,1,{
        "type": "select",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索排序'],'searchorder')",
        "chars":searchOrder,
        "default": Map("searchorder")||"综合排序"
    });
    }
    push("搜索关键词", "",d["2"],1,{
        "type": "text",
        "viewName":"'搜索关键词： '+Map('searchk')",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索关键词'],'searchk',1)",
        "default":Map("searchk")
    });
    push("🔍搜索", "", d["5"],1,{
    	    "action":"toSearch()",   
        "type": "button"       
    });
push("👤我的", "", 1);
push("推送视频", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/index/top/feed/rcmd", num);
push("热门视频", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/popular?pn={\{page}}", num);
push("入站必刷", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/popular/precious", num);

if (mid) {
    push("正在直播", "https://api.live.bilibili.com/xlive/web-ucenter/v1/xfetter/GetWebList?hit_ab=true", num);

    push("专栏动态", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all?timezone_offset=-480&type=article&platform=web&offset={\{if(page==1){source.put("nextoffset","")};source.get("nextoffset")}}&page={\{page}}`, num);
    push("视频动态", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all?timezone_offset=-480&type=video&platform=web&offset={\{if(page==1){source.put("dnextoffset","")};source.get("dnextoffset")}}&page={\{page}}`, num);
    push("历史记录", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/history/cursor?max={\{if(page==1){source.put("nextoffset","")};source.get("nextoffset")}}`, num);
    if(启用占位){
    push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
    push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
    }
push("⚙️关注分组", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['⚙️关注分组'],'follows')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("follows")||展开符
});

if(isShow('follows',展开符)){
        push("全部", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/followings?vmid="+mid+"&pn={\{page}}",num);
