ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>

let b = String(book.bookUrl);
let bmid = S("$.data.mid||$.data.list.mid||$.data.item.basic.uid||$.data.item.modules.module_author.mid||$.data.owner.mid||$.data.root.mid");
let bookintro = String(book.intro);
book.putVariable("mid", bmid);
cache.put("mid",bmid);

caid = String(cache.get("aid"));	cache.put("aid",S("$.result.main_section.episodes[0].aid"));

book.putVariable("id",S("$.data.item.basic.comment_id_str"));
getMode();

if (/web-interface\/view|series|season_id=|acc\/info/.test(b)) {
    if (/音频模式/.test(bookintro)) {
        book.type = 32;
    } else if (/视频模式/.test(bookintro)) {
        book.type = 4;
    }
} else if (/article/.test(b)) {
    book.type = 8;
}

if (/web-interface\/view/.test(baseUrl)) {
    var p = JSON.parse(result).data;
    book.putVariable("mid", p.owner.mid);
    var d = [];
    var aid = p.aid;
    
    if (p.pages.length == 1) {
        cid = p.pages[0].cid;
        d.push({
            title: p.title,
            url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(aid+"&"+p.cid)},{"type":"c"}`,
            pubdate: p.pubdate,
            desc: formatTimeDynamic(p.duration)
        });
    } else if (p.pages.length > 1) {
        p.pages.forEach(item => {
            cid = item.cid;
            d.push({
                title: item.part===""?"无名":item.part,
                desc: formatTimeDynamic(item.duration),
                url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(aid+"&"+item.cid)},{"type":"c"}`,
                pubdate: item.pubdate,

            })
        })
    }
    if (p.ugc_season) {
        d.unshift({
            title: "当前视频",
            vol: 1
        });

        let s = p.ugc_season.sections;
                    if(/倒序/.test(M("合集"))){
                          s= s.reverse();
                    }
                    d.push({
                        title:"视频合集",
                        vol:1
                    });
                      
                    
        s.forEach(el=> {
            if(s.length>1){
            d.push({
                        title: "🎥 "+ el.title+"【"+el.episodes.length+"个视频】",
                        url:`data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode("🎥"+el.title)},{"type":"el"}`
                    });
               }
                    ep = el.episodes;
                    if(/倒序/.test(M("合集"))){
                          ep = ep.reverse();
                    }
               ep.forEach((x,i) => {
                     if(x.bvid === p.bvid){
                        d[0].title = d[0].title+ "  "+(i+1)+"/" +el.episodes.length+"【"+el.title+"】"+x.title
                    }
                if (x.pages.length == 1) {
                    d.push({
                        title:(i+1)+"🏷 "+ x.title+" ",
                        url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.aid + "&" + (x.pages[0] ? x.pages[0].cid : x.cid))},{"type":""}`,
                        pubdate: x.arc.pubdate,
                        desc: formatTimeDynamic(x.arc.duration)
                    });
                }

                if (x.pages.length > 1) {
                     d.push({
                        title: (i+1)+" 📖 "+ x.title+"【"+x.pages.length+"P】",
                        url:`data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode("🎥"+x.title)},{"type":"el"}`
                    });
                    x.pages.forEach((y,j)=> {
                        d.push({
                            title: (i+1)+"-" +(j+1)+"🏷 "+y.part,
                            url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.aid + "&" + y.cid)},{"type":""}`,
                            pubdate: y?.arc?.pubdate ?? x?.arc?.pubdate ??"",
                            desc: formatTimeDynamic(y?.arc.duration ?? y.duration) + " "+x.title
                        });
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    }
    result = JSON.stringify(d)
} else if (/reply\/reply/.test(baseUrl)) {
    if(JSON.parse(src)?.data?.root?.mid){
        book.putVariable("mid", JSON.parse(src)?.data?.root?.mid);
    }
} else if (/x\/article\/view/.test(baseUrl)) {
    book.putVariable("mid", S("$.data.author.mid"));
    result = JSON.stringify([{
        "title": S("$.data.title"),
        "url": getApi("article",S("$.data.id"),S("$.data.dyn_id_str"))
    }])
} else if (/acc\/info/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let name = S("$.data.name");
    let mid = S("$.data.mid");
    let d = [];
    let roomid = S("$.data.live_room.roomid");
    
    let liveStatus = S("$.data.live_room.liveStatus");
    if (liveStatus == "1") {
        liveStatus = "🔴";
        java.toast("【" + name + "】正在直播");
        java.log("【" + name + "】正在直播");
    } else if (liveStatus == "0") {
        liveStatus = "⚪️"
    }
    if (S("$.data.live_room.roundStatus") == "1") {
        liveStatus = "🟢"
    }
    let title = S("$.data.live_room.title");
    
    if (/🔴|🟢/.test(liveStatus)) {
        result = java.ajax("https://api.live.bilibili.com/xlive/web-room/v2/index/getRoomPlayInfo?room_id="+roomid+"&protocol=0,1&format=0,1,2&codec=0,1&qn=30000");
        let data = JSON.parse(result).data;
        let stream = data.playurl_info?.playurl?.stream;
        
        if(stream){
            let codec = stream[0].format[0].codec[0];
            let base_url = codec.base_url;
            let accept_qn = codec.accept_qn;
            accept_qn.forEach(code=>{
                d.push({
                    title:getVideoQuality(code),
                    vol:true
                });
               
                    codec.url_info.forEach((u,i)=>{
                         if(codec.current_qn==code){
                             let host = u.host;
                             let extra = u.extra;
                             d.push({
                                 title: (liveStatus+getVideoQuality(code)+(i+1) + "、【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                                 url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(host+base_url+extra+"❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
                             })
                         }else{
                             d.push({
                                 title: (liveStatus+getVideoQuality(code)+(i+1) + "、【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                                 url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(i+"&"+code+"❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
                             })
                         }
                  })
              })
             
          }else if(data.playurl_info == null){
              d.push({
                  title: (liveStatus+"直播已结束【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                  url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode("❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
          }
      }else {
        d.push({
            title: (liveStatus+"【" + title + "】" + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
            url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode("❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
    }
    
   
   /*
  //  直接获取视频流
    if (/中/.test(liveStatus)) {
        let liveApi = "https://api.live.bilibili.com/room/v1/Room/playUrl?qn=30000&cid=" + roomid;
        let data = java.ajax(liveApi);
        let durl = JSON.parse(data).data.durl;
        durl.forEach((x,i) => {
        	java.log(durl.length-1-i)
            d.push({
                title: "线路" + x.order,
                vol: true
            }, {
                title: (x.order + "、【" + title + "】" + liveStatus + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(durl[durl.length-1-i].url)},{type:"live"}`
            })
        })
    } else {
        d.push({
            title: ("【" + title + "】" + liveStatus + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
            url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(roomid+"&"+mid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
    }
    */
   
    result = JSON.stringify(d)
} else if (/data:dynamic_type|opus\/detail|v1\/detail/.test(baseUrl)) {
    
    result = JSON.stringify([{
        title:String(book.name),
        url:baseUrl
    }])
}
result

bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程
exploreUrl:
<js>
var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_tab') || getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources =  getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';


function checkEnv() {
    let isModified = false;
    try {
        new Packages.io.legato.kazusa.utils.TimeoutCancellationException('');
        isModified = true;
    } catch (e) {
        isModified = typeof source.loginUi == 'function' ? false : true;
    }

    return isModified;
}

var islyc = checkEnv();
let device_type = '安卓';
try {
	  try {
	  java.qread();
	  device_type ="轻阅读";
	  } catch {
	  	java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
	  	}
    
} catch (e) {
    try {
        java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (islyc && device_type == '安卓'){
	sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_source') || sources;
	setArguments('find_source', sources);
	}
var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];


var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架" + fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};



qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url + '/get_book_shelf,' + qtop;

let qtsj = [];

if (islyc && device_type == '安卓') {
    try {
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "线路",
            host,
            base_url,
            "server",
            1
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "模式",
            ["小说", "听书", "短剧", "漫画"],
            tab,
            "find_tab",
            0.33
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "频道",
            ["男频", "女频"],
            source_type,
            "source_type",
            0.33
        ));
        let source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '书旗', '塔读', '江湖', '小米', '米读', 'QQ阅读', '酷我小说','幻梦轻小说', '西瓜小说', '69书吧', '顶点', '爱下电子书', '伪69', '超会专属小说', '番薯小说', '阅友小说', '笔趣阁22', '微山书院', '中华典藏', '老福特'];
        if (tab == '听书') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '喜马拉雅', '酷我'];
        }
        if (tab == '漫画') {
            source_list = ['全面漫画', '番茄', '包子漫画', '歪瑞古德', 'G社漫画'];
        }
        if (tab == '短剧') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '河马', '旺旺短剧'];
        }
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "平台",
            source_list,
            sources,
            "find_source",
            1
        ));
       const excludeTitles = ['点击登录可切换来源', '切换后长按刷新即可'];
       style_list = style_list.filter(item => !excludeTitles.includes(item.title));
    } catch {}
} else {
	if (device_type == '安卓'){
	qtsj.push({
        "title": "下载阅读Σ最新测试版",
        "url": '{\{java.longToast("本书源推荐使用最新版洛娅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download","下载阅读Σ最新测试版");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
        }
    })}
	}

qtsj.push({
    title: "大灰狼个人中心",
    url: qtsjurl,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})

var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

<js>
if (String(baseUrl).startsWith("data:")) {
    let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
    let book_id = res.book_id;
    let tab = res.tab;
    let sources = res.sources;
    let url = res.url;
    let html = "";
    let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
    if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
        if (sources == '69书吧') {
            let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
            let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };            
             let op = JSON.stringify({
                "headers": headers
            });
            html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
        } else {
            html = java.ajax(url);
        }
        //java.log(html);
        if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
            cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
            java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
            html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

             java.log(html);
        }
    }
    let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
    let op = {
        method: "POST",
        body: {
            html: html
        }
    };
    op = JSON.stringify(op);
    let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (varia == 'null') {
        varia = '';
    }
    varia = JSON.stringify({
        'custom': varia
    });
    //varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
    java.log(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
    result = java.ajax(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
}
result
</js>$.data
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

        let headers = {

             };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);    
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

} else {

ruleContent.content:
<js>
// 假设 result 变量已包含 HTML 字符串
var document = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);

var preElements = document.select('div#content-section.content-section > pre');
if (preElements.isEmpty()) {
    result = '未找到 div#content-section.content-section > pre 元素';
} else {
    var preElement = preElements.first();
    var innerHtml = preElement.html();
    
    // 定义转换函数（注意：在 Rhino 中使用 var 或 function）
    function convertHtmlToPlainTextWithLineBreaks(html) {
        var text = html;
        text = text.replaceAll(" ", " ");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<p[^>]*><\\/p>", "\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<p[^>]*>(.*?)<\\/p>", "\n$1\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<br\\s*\\/?>", "\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("<[^>]+>", "");
        text = text.replaceAll("\\n{3,}", "\n\n");
        return text.trim();
    }
    
    // 调用函数，获取纯文本
    var plainText = convertHtmlToPlainTextWithLineBreaks(innerHtml);
    result = plainText;
}
</js>

<js>
var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || host[0];
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_tab') || getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources =  getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';


function checkEnv() {
    let isModified = false;
    try {
        new Packages.io.legato.kazusa.utils.TimeoutCancellationException('');
        isModified = true;
    } catch (e) {
        isModified = typeof source.loginUi == 'function' ? false : true;
    }

    return isModified;
}

var islyc = checkEnv();
let device_type = '安卓';
try {
	  try {
	  java.qread();
	  device_type ="轻阅读";
	  } catch {
	  	java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
	  	}
    
} catch (e) {
    try {
        java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if ((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读'){
	sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_source') || sources;
	setArguments('find_source', sources);
	}
var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [ ];
if (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部') {
infoData = [{
        "title": "登录番茄",
        "url": '{\{java.startBrowser("https://fanqienovel.com/","番茄登录");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
        }
    }];
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架" + fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
//let qtcookie = ""
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};



qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url + '/get_book_shelf,' + qtop;

let qtsj = [];

if ((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读') {
    try {
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "线路",
            host,
            base_url,
            "server",
            1
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "模式",
            ["小说", "听书", "短剧", "漫画"],
            tab,
            "find_tab",
            0.33
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "频道",
            ["男频", "女频"],
            source_type,
            "source_type",
            0.33
        ));
        let source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '书旗', '塔读', '江湖', '小米', '米读', 'QQ阅读', '酷我小说','幻梦轻小说', '西瓜小说', '69书吧', '顶点', '爱下电子书', '伪69', '超会专属小说', '番薯小说', '阅友小说', '笔趣阁22', '微山书院', '中华典藏', '老福特'];
        if (tab == '听书') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '喜马拉雅', '酷我'];
        }
        if (tab == '漫画') {
            source_list = ['全面漫画', '番茄', '包子漫画', '歪瑞古德', 'G社漫画'];
        }
        if (tab == '短剧') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '河马', '旺旺短剧'];
        }
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "平台",
            source_list,
            sources,
            "find_source",
            1
        ));
       const excludeTitles = ['点击登录可切换来源', '切换后长按刷新即可'];
       style_list = style_list.filter(item => !excludeTitles.includes(item.title));
    } catch {}
} else {
	if (device_type == '安卓'){
	qtsj.push({
        "title": "下载阅读Sigma最新测试版",
        "url": '{\{java.longToast("本书源推荐使用最新版洛娅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://legado.gyks.cf","下载阅读Sigma最新测试版");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
        }
    })}
	}

if (qtcookie) {
qtsj.push({
    title: "晴天个人中心",
    url: qtsjurl,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})
} else {
qtsj.push({
    title: "登录晴天书源",
    url: `{\{java.startBrowser("${base_url}/login","登录书源");}}`,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})
}


var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server")|| host[0];
let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

             };

        });

        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server")|| host[0];
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server')|| host[0];
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };

                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {

        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {

    }
}

var style_list = [];

        if (tab == '听书') {

let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';

    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读" || sources == "QQ阅读" || sources == "svip_QQ阅读") && fqpara == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, 'ident="' + base_url)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, 'book_id=' + book_id + '&ssionid=' + fqssionid);
    if (device_type == "苹果") {
        content = paraForiOS(content, sources);
    } else {
        content = paraForAndroid(content, sources,islyc);
    }
}
data = JSON.stringify({
    content: content,
});
if (device_type == "安卓" && (tab == "短剧" || tab == "视频" || sources.includes('毒舌影视') || sources.includes('NT动漫'))) {
    data = {
        content: `【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`,
    };
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
    if (book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        let video_url = `${base_url}/online_video?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}`;
        if (sources.includes('毒舌影视') || sources.includes('NT动漫')) {
            video_url = content;
        };
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast("正在加载视频...");
    }

}
data;
</js>$.content

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
if (res.method) {
    res = Object.fromEntries(
        res.body
        .replace("source", "sources")
        .split("&")
        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );
    res.url = "";
}
let book_id = res.book_id;
java.put('book_id', book_id);
let tab = res.tab;
let sources = res.sources;
let url = res.url;
let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
        let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);    
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

let item_id = result.item_id;

let url = result.toc_url || "";
let qtcontent = {
    book_id: book_id,
    item_id: item_id,
    title: title,
    sources: sources,
    tab: tab,
    url: url,
};
qtcontent = java.base64Encode(JSON.stringify(qtcontent));
if (sources == '卷') {
    content_url = item_id
} else if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && tab == "小说") {
    var base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server") || "";
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    let sourcess = sources.replace('svip_', '');
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3","js":"book ? result : '${base_url}/get_review?book_id=${book_id}&item_id=${item_id}&ssionid=${fqssionid}&source=${sourcess}'"}`;
} else {
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3"}`;
}

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>
